name: revit_place_panel_schedules_on_sheet
description: Places panel schedule views on a sheet, spacing instances horizontally.

sheet_view_id.description: ViewSheet element id to receive schedules

schedule_view_ids.description: PanelScheduleView ids to place; omit to place all instance views

start_origin.description: Optional placement origin in sheet coordinates

notes: Uses active sheet in sample; MCP should accept explicit sheet_view_id.
